title: cpf policy
description: Declarative hook policy for cpf-scaffolded projects. Consumed by .claude-plugin/lib/cpf-policy.sh at runtime and by /cpf:specforge init and upgrade for semantic validation.

_comment.description: Free-form note field. Ignored by the loader. Authored copies may reference this schema URL here.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for editor tooling.

hooks.description: Map of hook name to hook stanza. Hook names are free-form strings matching the name used by cpf_policy_get / cpf_policy_list callers.

include.description: Glob patterns selecting files in scope. Consumed by config generators.

exclude.description: Glob patterns excluded from scope. Consumed by config generators.

orchestrator.description: Dispatch style. none = invoke the native tool directly. task = delegate to a Taskfile target. custom = invoke the command in custom_command.

severity.description: How the hook's overall exit code maps to caller-visible severity.

on_missing_runner.description: Behavior when no per-service runner can be resolved for a tool (neither $dir/.venv/bin/<tool> nor `uv run --project $dir <tool>` is available). Default is warn. INFRA-025: applies to the verify-quality legacy walker's Python branch; per-service opt-out via [tool.cpf.hooks] skip in pyproject.toml is logged as SKIP regardless of this field.

on_missing_tests.description: Behavior when a test runner reports no tests collected.

custom_command.description: Shell command invoked when orchestrator == custom.
